title: Device Environment Center
subtitle: Understand storage, project location, network and development readiness — calm diagnostics, no automatic changes.
errorMessage: Aipify could not load your device environment right now. Please try again.
emptyTitle: Aipify has not checked this device yet
emptyMessage: Run a device environment check to help Aipify understand your workspace and identify possible issues.
warningTitle: Aipify found items that may affect your workflow.
permissionText: Aipify can inspect your local environment to identify issues that may affect your work. Aipify will not change anything without approval.
privacyNote: No hidden monitoring. Observations require permission. No automatic fixes.
faqWhatIsAnswer: Device & Environment Intelligence helps Aipify understand local workspace conditions such as storage, project location, network status and development readiness.
faqAutoChange: Does Aipify change my computer automatically?
faqAutoChangeAnswer: No. This phase only observes, explains and recommends. Any system-changing action requires explicit approval.
faqLocationAnswer: Development projects can become slower or unstable when stored inside cloud-synced folders such as iCloud Drive, Dropbox or OneDrive.
noAutomaticFixes: Suggestions only — Aipify will not delete files, move folders, or change system settings automatically.
